visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a black beret, and a yellow Roots t-shirt stands against a light blue textured wall. He holds a grey smartphone, gesturing with his hands as he speaks directly to the camera in a brightly lit studio environment. (2) Close-up shot of the back of a grey smartphone, showing a large square camera module with four circular lenses and the Leica branding. The man's hands are visible holding the device securely while showcasing its metallic texture. (3) The phone's screen is shown, displaying the camera interface. The camera focuses on vibrant pink flowers in a macro shot, then switches to an outdoor scene of a modern building with Fubon Life signage. (4) A sequence of outdoor photography shots follows, demonstrating different zoom levels (5x, 20x, 100x) on the Fubon Art Museum signage. The lighting is bright daylight, and the background shows urban architectural elements. (5) The man returns to the screen, still wearing his yellow shirt and beret, speaking enthusiastically. He demonstrates a 'Street Photography' mode on the phone, showing a small figurine on a desk under warm indoor lighting. (6) A landscape view of a tablet (Xiaomi Pad Mini) on a stand is shown. The screen displays high-definition footage of a golden grain field, then switches to a close-up of colorful fish and a pink flamingo. (7) A man in a different outfit (white t-shirt and grey flat cap) is seen sitting on a sofa in a living room, holding and using the tablet. The camera shows a medium shot of him interacting with the screen. (8) Close-up shots show the tablet's interaction with a phone, demonstrating file transfer and screen extension features. The interface is clean and digital. (9) The main character in the yellow shirt concludes the video, holding the tablet and pointing downwards towards the caption area as he finishes his presentation.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 喜歡徠卡風格照片嗎. (2) [Subtitle]: Xiaomi 15T Pro 幫你準備好了. (3) [Subtitle]: 三顆徠卡認證主鏡頭. (4) [Subtitle]: 拍廣、拍遠其實都OK. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且這次搭載全新的. (6) [Subtitle]: 5倍潛望長焦鏡頭. (7) [Subtitle]: 也是首次支援微距功能. (8) [Slogan]: Xiaomi 15T Pro 微距實拍. (9) [Subtitle]: 變焦超過20倍的時候. (10) [Variety]: Ultra Zoom 2.0. (11) [Subtitle]: 功能就會自動啟動. (12) [Subtitle]: 幫你最佳化照片的細節. (13) [Subtitle]: 最遠可以放大到100倍. (14) [Slogan]: Xiaomi 15T Pro 5X. (15) [Slogan]: Xiaomi 15T Pro 20X. (16) [Slogan]: Xiaomi 15T Pro 100X. (17) [Subtitle]: 拿來拍演唱會、拍啦啦隊、拍貓狗都剛剛好. (18) [Subtitle]: 它目前是最平易近人最容易上手的徠卡鏡頭. (19) [Variety]: 按兩下音量鍵 啟動街拍模式. (20) [Subtitle]: 也是T系列首次支援街拍模式3.0的手機喔. (21) [Subtitle]: 擁有同級最強的效能 最高的光學變焦. (22) [Subtitle]: 最大的變焦焦段 而且還有最大的電量. (23) [Subtitle]: 6.83吋大螢幕. (24) [Subtitle]: 5500mAh大電池. (25) [Subtitle]: 聯發科9400+處理器. (26) [Subtitle]: 晶片是不是超強 而且還搭載時尚金屬色外觀. (27) [Subtitle]: 90W快充 也支援全新的無網通訊功能. (28) [Logo]: iPASS一卡通. (29) [Subtitle]: 跟上一代一樣 也支援一卡通. (30) [Subtitle]: 如果你覺得6.83吋還不夠大 我跟你講小米的一個更大的螢幕就在這裡. (31) [Subtitle]: 它這次同步也推出了 它最強的旗艦等級的小平板. (32) [Subtitle]: Xiaomi Pad Mini 8.8吋. (33) [Subtitle]: 3K LCD的螢幕 看起來舒適而且又明亮. (34) [Subtitle]: 聯發科9400+處理器 3奈米處理器. (35) [Subtitle]: 7500mAh大電池 你上班帶著工作 下班拿來追劇看電影. (36) [Subtitle]: 全天候電力滿滿 而且它搭配Xiaomi焦點觸控筆. (37) [Subtitle]: 寫筆記畫畫都很方便. (38) [Subtitle]: 更厲害是它還串聯蘋果生態系. (39) [Subtitle]: 當做Mac做一個延伸螢幕 或直接跟iPhone資料互傳. (40) [Subtitle]: 更多手機平板的資訊 在留言處或資訊欄在下面 趕快去看吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator appearing throughout the video in various settings.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair and glasses. He is seen wearing a yellow 'Roots' t-shirt with a black beret, and later a white t-shirt with a grey flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features a blue textured studio wall, an outdoor city street with modern commercial buildings and museums, a cozy indoor living room with a sofa and television, and digital screen captures of device interfaces.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker begins with a high-energy greeting. Upbeat, synthesized electronic BGM with a strong 4/4 beat plays continuously in the background. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition. The speaker introduces a product with clear articulation and high pitch variability. (3) A digital 'ding' sounds as a technical label appears. The BGM remains steady with bright, shimmering textures. (4) A camera shutter 'click' SFX triggers as the narration discusses camera features. (5) Another 'whoosh' transition occurs. The speaker's voice is consistent in its professional, enthusiastic tone. (6) Soft UI 'blip' sounds are heard during the screen recording section, signifying interaction. (7) A 'pop' bubble SFX punctuates the mention of a specific feature. (8) The BGM continues with high energy as the speaker transitions to discussing the tablet. (9) A final series of digital interface sounds emphasize the ecosystem connectivity. The narrator ends with a rising intonation for a call to action, followed by a quick BGM fade out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product 1 (Xiaomi 15T Pro) Hardware Specs -> Photography Demo -> Product 2 (Xiaomi Pad Mini) Specs -> Ecosystem Features -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the release of the Xiaomi 15T Pro smartphone and Xiaomi Pad Mini by highlighting their powerful hardware, Leica camera systems, and integration with other Apple devices to drive purchase intent.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of products, listing of detailed specifications, and a final call to action directing viewers to comments for more information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-quality, social-media-ready tech review with fast pacing and clear information delivery, typical of professional 3C influencers.
